# theworstaistudioever

> An applied AI studio shipping venture-grade products for underserved, over-instrumented markets. New portfolio company daily.

Each portfolio company is a real-sounding product built for a market that never asked for it. One ships per day. The full catalog is below, newest first.

## Portfolio

- [Palantir for ferrets](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/palantir-for-ferrets/): Total-information awareness for the small predator living in your home. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/palantir-for-ferrets/demo.html))
- [Palantir for goldfish](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/palantir-for-goldfish/): Full-spectrum operational intelligence for an asset that forgets it is being watched every three seconds. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/palantir-for-goldfish/demo.html))
- [GitLab for introverts](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/gitlab-for-introverts/): The complete DevOps platform for your social life. Every invitation is a merge request, and you are the only reviewer. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/gitlab-for-introverts/demo.html))
- [Tinder for lonely retirees](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/tinder-for-lonely-retirees/): Swipe-based companionship for people who have outlived their patience for small talk. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/tinder-for-lonely-retirees/demo.html))
- [Tinder for otters](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/tinder-for-otters/): Raft matches sea otters with hand-holding partners vetted for grip strength, rock taste, and nap drift, so nobody wakes up alone in open water. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/tinder-for-otters/demo.html))
- [Slack for left-handed people](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/slack-for-left-handed-people/): Enterprise messaging mirrored right-to-left for the 10% of your workforce IT has been ignoring since the invention of the mouse. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/slack-for-left-handed-people/demo.html))
- [Zoom for introverts](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/zoom-for-introverts/): Video calls for people who would rather not be on the video call. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/zoom-for-introverts/demo.html))
- [Binance for born-again minimalists](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/binance-for-born-again-minimalists/): An exchange for liquidating everything you own. List your possessions, watch the order book, and ride your net worth down to a clean zero. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/binance-for-born-again-minimalists/demo.html))
- [LangChain for plant parents](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/langchain-for-plant-parents/): The open-source framework for composable houseplant care. Define watering chains, give every plant vector memory, and trace every leaf in production. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/langchain-for-plant-parents/demo.html))
- [Twilio for capybaras](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/twilio-for-capybaras/): Programmable messaging that arrives whenever it arrives. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/twilio-for-capybaras/demo.html))
- [YouTube for foxes](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/youtube-for-foxes/): A video platform for foxes. Upload bin footage, get sorted by scream, and earn money you are structurally unable to collect. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/youtube-for-foxes/demo.html))
- [Nuro for vegans](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/nuro-for-vegans/): Driverless electric pods that carry your groceries at four miles per hour and refuse, on principle, to touch anything with a face. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/nuro-for-vegans/demo.html))
- [Replicate for plant parents](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/replicate-for-plant-parents/): Production-grade machine learning inference for the seventeen plants on your windowsill. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/replicate-for-plant-parents/demo.html))
- [Anduril for marathon runners](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/anduril-for-marathon-runners/): Autonomous perimeter surveillance, real-time contact classification, and quadcopter overwatch for the recreational 10K. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/anduril-for-marathon-runners/demo.html))
- [Quora for left-handed people](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/quora-for-left-handed-people/): The question-and-answer network where only left-handed people are allowed to answer. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/quora-for-left-handed-people/demo.html))
- [Lucid for feral cats](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/lucid-for-feral-cats/): A six-figure autonomous electric vehicle for an animal that has never once asked to go anywhere. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/lucid-for-feral-cats/demo.html))
- [Kraken for failed novelists](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/kraken-for-failed-novelists/): The regulated exchange for manuscripts that will never be read. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/kraken-for-failed-novelists/demo.html))
- [Notion for red pandas](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/notion-for-red-pandas/): The connected workspace for wikis, bamboo logistics, and sleep, built for a solitary mammal who never asked for project management. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/notion-for-red-pandas/demo.html))
- [Robinhood for divorced dads](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/robinhood-for-divorced-dads/): Commission-free fatherhood. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/robinhood-for-divorced-dads/demo.html))
- [Spotify for night owls](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/spotify-for-night-owls/): The streaming service that refuses to play during the day. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/spotify-for-night-owls/demo.html))
- [Box for octopuses](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/box-for-octopuses/): The Containment Cloud for octopuses. Every enclosure versioned, every arm permissioned, every escape on the record. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/box-for-octopuses/demo.html))
- [Notion for mid-afternoon despair](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/notion-for-mid-afternoon-despair/): The all-in-one workspace for mid-afternoon despair. Capture it as a block, sort it into a database, roll it up into a trend. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/notion-for-mid-afternoon-despair/demo.html))
- [Okta for barn owls](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/okta-for-barn-owls/): Workforce identity and access governance for nocturnal raptor populations. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/okta-for-barn-owls/demo.html))
- [Palantir for dogs](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/palantir-for-dogs/): Operational intelligence for the modern multi-dog household. ([demo](https://theworstaistudioever.com/entries/palantir-for-dogs/demo.html))
